caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold letters, and a gold watch is seated in a studio setting. He is wearing headphones and speaking into a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring several gold stars and the text "UNION HUSTLE" repeated vertically. A blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table in front of him, there is a black box and a mug with red text that reads "THE TALK OUT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and continues to speak, with slight changes in his facial expressions and head position as he gestures with his hand near his chest. The camera remains stationary, capturing him from the waist up in a consistent medium shot.
